form.formComment: Recent form below what she is capable of. Last start 6th over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 5th- beaten 5 m by Woodmere Ohdoya (1:58.40) in FM on April 8 at $5.50. The start before 5th over 1609m at this track was 6th- at the bell, beaten 6 m by J M Ooh Lala (1:59.20) in FM on April 1 at $9.30. Nicely placed to find a bit of form.
